option.name: originalContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24)
project(ModelBuilder VERSION 0.4.0 DESCRIPTION "Modular components to build a model on categorical data" LANGUAGES CXX )
include(GNUInstallDirs) include(CMakePackageConfigHelpers)
option(MODELBUILDER_BUILD_EXAMPLES "Build ModelBuilder examples" ON) option(MODELBUILDER_BUILD_TESTS "Build ModelBuilder tests" ON) option(MODELBUILDER_ENABLE_INSTALL "Enable install/export rules (requires dependencies available as packages)" OFF)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20) set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON) set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
add_library(ModelBuilder src/ModelBuilder.cpp src/TreeBuilder.cpp ) add_library(ModelBuilder::ModelBuilder ALIAS ModelBuilder)
target_include_directories(ModelBuilder PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include> $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}> )
# Dependencies include(FetchContent)
FetchContent_Declare(LeftTree GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/nathanjrussell/LeftTree GIT_TAG v1.0.0 )
FetchContent_Declare(ContingencyTable GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/nathanjrussell/ContingencyTable GIT_TAG v4.4.0 )
FetchContent_Declare(CPPTypeConcepts GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/nathanjrussell/CPP-Type-Concepts.git GIT_TAG v1.0.0 )
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(LeftTree ContingencyTable CPPTypeConcepts)
get_target_property(_LEFTTREE_INCLUDE_DIRS LeftTree::LeftTree INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES) get_target_property(_CONTINGENCY_INCLUDE_DIRS ContingencyTable::ContingencyTable INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES) get_target_property(_DATATABLE_INCLUDE_DIRS DataTable::DataTable INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
target_link_libraries(ModelBuilder PUBLIC CPPTypeConcepts::cpp_type_concepts PRIVATE LeftTree::LeftTree ContingencyTable::ContingencyTable )
# We need the dependency headers when building ModelBuilder itself, but we don't want to # export these FetchContent deps as requirements of the installed target. target_include_directories(ModelBuilder PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${_LEFTTREE_INCLUDE_DIRS}> $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${_CONTINGENCY_INCLUDE_DIRS}> $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${_DATATABLE_INCLUDE_DIRS}> )
# Warnings (nice defaults for dev) if(MSVC) target_compile_options(ModelBuilder PRIVATE /W4) else() target_compile_options(ModelBuilder PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic) endif()
if(MODELBUILDER_BUILD_EXAMPLES) add_subdirectory(examples) endif()
if(MODELBUILDER_BUILD_TESTS) enable_testing() add_subdirectory(tests) endif()
# ---- Install / Package ---- # When developing this repo, we build dependencies via FetchContent. Those targets are not meant # to be exported from this package. To keep development builds working, we only enable the install # rules when ModelBuilder is the top-level project. if(MODELBUILDER_ENABLE_INSTALL) install(TARGETS ModelBuilder EXPORT ModelBuilderTargets ARCHIVE DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR} LIBRARY DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR} RUNTIME DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR} )
install(DIRECTORY include/ DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR} )
install(EXPORT ModelBuilderTargets FILE ModelBuilderTargets.cmake NAMESPACE ModelBuilder:: DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}/cmake/ModelBuilder )
configure_package_config_file( ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/ModelBuilderConfig.cmake.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ModelBuilderConfig.cmake INSTALL_DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}/cmake/ModelBuilder )
write_basic_package_version_file( ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ModelBuilderConfigVersion.cmake VERSION ${PROJECT_VERSION} COMPATIBILITY SameMajorVersion )
install(FILES ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ModelBuilderConfig.cmake ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ModelBuilderConfigVersion.cmake DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}/cmake/ModelBuilder ) endif()

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24)
project(ModelBuilder VERSION 0.4.0 DESCRIPTION "Modular components to build a model on categorical data" LANGUAGES CXX )
include(GNUInstallDirs) include(CMakePackageConfigHelpers)
option(MODELBUILDER_BUILD_EXAMPLES "Build ModelBuilder examples" ON) option(MODELBUILDER_BUILD_TESTS "Build ModelBuilder tests" ON) option(MODELBUILDER_ENABLE_INSTALL "Enable install/export rules (requires dependencies available as packages)" OFF)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20) set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON) set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
add_library(ModelBuilder src/ModelBuilder.cpp src/MultiModelBuilder.cpp src/TreeBuilder.cpp ) add_library(ModelBuilder::ModelBuilder ALIAS ModelBuilder)
target_include_directories(ModelBuilder PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include> $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}> )
# Dependencies include(FetchContent)
FetchContent_Declare(LeftTree GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/nathanjrussell/LeftTree GIT_TAG v1.0.0 )
FetchContent_Declare(ContingencyTable GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/nathanjrussell/ContingencyTable GIT_TAG v4.4.0 )
FetchContent_Declare(CPPTypeConcepts GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/nathanjrussell/CPP-Type-Concepts.git GIT_TAG v1.0.0 )
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(LeftTree ContingencyTable CPPTypeConcepts)
get_target_property(_LEFTTREE_INCLUDE_DIRS LeftTree::LeftTree INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES) get_target_property(_CONTINGENCY_INCLUDE_DIRS ContingencyTable::ContingencyTable INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES) get_target_property(_DATATABLE_INCLUDE_DIRS DataTable::DataTable INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
target_link_libraries(ModelBuilder PUBLIC CPPTypeConcepts::cpp_type_concepts PRIVATE LeftTree::LeftTree ContingencyTable::ContingencyTable )
# We need the dependency headers when building ModelBuilder itself, but we don't want to # export these FetchContent deps as requirements of the installed target. target_include_directories(ModelBuilder PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${_LEFTTREE_INCLUDE_DIRS}> $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${_CONTINGENCY_INCLUDE_DIRS}> $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${_DATATABLE_INCLUDE_DIRS}> )
# Warnings (nice defaults for dev) if(MSVC) target_compile_options(ModelBuilder PRIVATE /W4) else() target_compile_options(ModelBuilder PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic) endif()
if(MODELBUILDER_BUILD_EXAMPLES) add_subdirectory(examples) endif()
if(MODELBUILDER_BUILD_TESTS) enable_testing() add_subdirectory(tests) endif()
# ---- Install / Package ---- # When developing this repo, we build dependencies via FetchContent. Those targets are not meant # to be exported from this package. To keep development builds working, we only enable the install # rules when ModelBuilder is the top-level project. if(MODELBUILDER_ENABLE_INSTALL) install(TARGETS ModelBuilder EXPORT ModelBuilderTargets ARCHIVE DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR} LIBRARY DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR} RUNTIME DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR} )
install(DIRECTORY include/ DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR} )
install(EXPORT ModelBuilderTargets FILE ModelBuilderTargets.cmake NAMESPACE ModelBuilder:: DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}/cmake/ModelBuilder )
configure_package_config_file( ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/ModelBuilderConfig.cmake.in ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ModelBuilderConfig.cmake INSTALL_DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}/cmake/ModelBuilder )
write_basic_package_version_file( ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ModelBuilderConfigVersion.cmake VERSION ${PROJECT_VERSION} COMPATIBILITY SameMajorVersion )
install(FILES ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ModelBuilderConfig.cmake ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ModelBuilderConfigVersion.cmake DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}/cmake/ModelBuilder ) endif()

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# ModelBuilder This combines a significant number of modular components to build a model on categorical data.
## Build ```sh cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug cmake --build build -j ```
### Build with optimizations (-O3) The usual way to get `-O3` with CMake is to build in `Release` mode:
```sh cmake -S . -B build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release cmake --build build-release -j ```
If you want to force `-O3` explicitly (in addition to what your toolchain uses for Release):
```sh cmake -S . -B build-release \ -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \ -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE="-O3" cmake --build build-release -j ```
## Run tests ```sh ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure ```
## Run example This repo builds an example executable named `modelbuilder_example`.
### Build (if you haven't already) ```sh cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug cmake --build build -j ```
### Run For single-config generators (Makefiles/Ninja), the binary is typically here: ```sh ./build/examples/modelbuilder_example ```
For multi-config generators (e.g. Xcode/Visual Studio), it is typically under a config subdir: ```sh ./build/examples/Debug/modelbuilder_example ```
If you're using the checked-in `cmake-build-debug/` folder instead of `build/`: ```sh ./cmake-build-debug/examples/modelbuilder_example ```
## CMake usage (as a dependency) This project exports a CMake target: - `ModelBuilder::ModelBuilder`
It also fetches (via `FetchContent`) the following dependencies: - `LeftTree` (tag `v1.0.0`) - `ContingencyTable` (tag `v4.2.0`) - `CPP-Type-Concepts` (tag `v1.0.0`, target `CPPTypeConcepts::cpp_type_concepts`)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# ModelBuilder This combines a significant number of modular components to build a model on categorical data.
## Build ```sh cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug cmake --build build -j ```
### Build with optimizations (-O3) The usual way to get `-O3` with CMake is to build in `Release` mode:
```sh cmake -S . -B build-release -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release cmake --build build-release -j ```
If you want to force `-O3` explicitly (in addition to what your toolchain uses for Release):
```sh cmake -S . -B build-release \ -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \ -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE="-O3" cmake --build build-release -j ```
## Run tests ```sh ctest --test-dir build --output-on-failure ```
## Run example This repo builds two example executables: - `TreeBuilder_example`: builds a single tree (a `TreeBuilder` artifact) and writes a Graphviz `.dot`. - `ModelBuilder_example`: builds many trees (one per target column) into `mb_trees.bin` + `mb_map.bin`, then demonstrates `getTree(targetColumn)` lazy loading.
### Build (if you haven't already) ```sh cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug cmake --build build -j ```
### Run For single-config generators (Makefiles/Ninja), the binary is typically here: ```sh ./build/examples/TreeBuilder_example ./build/examples/ModelBuilder_example ```
For multi-config generators (e.g. Xcode/Visual Studio), it is typically under a config subdir: ```sh ./build/examples/Debug/modelbuilder_example ```
If you're using the checked-in `cmake-build-debug/` folder instead of `build/`: ```sh ./cmake-build-debug/examples/modelbuilder_example ```
## CMake usage (as a dependency) This project exports a CMake target: - `ModelBuilder::ModelBuilder`
It also fetches (via `FetchContent`) the following dependencies: - `LeftTree` (tag `v1.0.0`) - `ContingencyTable` (tag `v4.2.0`) - `CPP-Type-Concepts` (tag `v1.0.0`, target `CPPTypeConcepts::cpp_type_concepts`)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
add_executable(TreeBuilder_example TreeBuilder_example.cpp )
target_link_libraries(TreeBuilder_example PRIVATE ModelBuilder::ModelBuilder )
add_executable(ModelBuilder_example ModelBuilder_example.cpp )
target_link_libraries(ModelBuilder_example PRIVATE ModelBuilder::ModelBuilder )

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
